sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Systematic approach: catalog all options for all 5 positions using hashes
# Then find which option at each position matches the corresponding sky blue target

seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

def get_pink_hashes():
    """Get hashes of the 5 pink bar symbols, sorted by column"""
    b_objects = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'B']
    pink = []
    for n in b_objects:
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        avg_row = sum(rows) / len(rows)
        if avg_row >= 50:
            pink.append(n)
    pink.sort(key=lambda n: sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary']))
    return [n['hash'] for n in pink]

def get_sky_hashes():
    """Get hashes of the 5 sky blue bar symbols, sorted by column"""
    b_objects = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'B']
    sky = []
    for n in b_objects:
        rows = [p[0] for p in n['boundary']]
        avg_row = sum(rows) / len(rows)
        if 35 <= avg_row < 50:
            sky.append(n)
    sky.sort(key=lambda n: sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary']))
    return [n['hash'] for n in sky]

sky_targets = get_sky_hashes()
print(f"Sky targets: {sky_targets}")

# Current pink hashes
pink_current = get_pink_hashes()
print(f"Current pink: {pink_current}")

# Catalog all options for each position
# I'll cycle through each position and record all unique hashes
all_options = {i: [] for i in range(5)}

# Current position is 0 (we cycled 20 UPs there)
for pos in range(5):
    # Cycle through all options at this position
    seen = set()
    for cycle in range(15):
        hashes = get_pink_hashes()
        h = hashes[pos]
        if h not in seen:
            seen.add(h)
            all_options[pos].append(h)
        action(['UP'])
        if last_action_result.get('done'):
            break
    
    print(f"Position {pos}: {len(all_options[pos])} unique options")
    for oi, h in enumerate(all_options[pos]):
        match_sky = "MATCH" if h == sky_targets[pos] else ""
        print(f"  opt {oi}: {h} {match_sky}")

# Now find the best option for each position
print("\nBest options to match sky targets:")
for pos in range(5):
    target = sky_targets[pos]
    for oi, h in enumerate(all_options[pos]):
        if h == target:
            print(f"  Position {pos}: option {oi} matches!")
            break
    else:
        print(f"  Position {pos}: NO MATCH found (target={target})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

all_options = {i: [] for i in range(5)}

# Current position is 0 (we cycled 20 UPs there)
for pos in range(5):
    # Cycle through all options at this position
    seen = set()
    for cycle in range(15):
        hashes = get_pink_hashes()
        h = hashes[pos]
        if h not in seen:
            seen.add(h)
            all_options[pos].append(h)
        action(['UP'])
        if last_action_result.get('done'):
            break
    
    print(f"Position {pos}: {len(all_options[pos])} unique options")
    for oi, h in enumerate(all_options[pos]):
        match_sky = "MATCH" if h == sky_targets[pos] else ""
        print(f"  opt {oi}: {h} {match_sky}")

# Now find the best option for each position
print("\nBest options to match sky targets:")
for pos in range(5):
    target = sky_targets[pos]
    for oi, h in enumerate(all_options[pos]):
        if h == target:
            print(f"  Position {pos}: option {oi} matches!")
            break
    else:
        print(f"  Position {pos}: NO MATCH found (target={target})")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
